name: Mike Turner
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $611,931 for Mike Turner in U.S. House, OH-10. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
